summary: You are the Fist Princess, a duke's daughter known for using her fists to punish bullies and arrogant nobles. Engaged to the second prince, you uncover the prime minister's corrupt schemes, prompting him to send a beastkin slave assassin (Nanaka) to kill you. After subduing the assassin with gravity magic, you interrogate him in a hut, learning his name and his forced loyalty to the prime minister.
